description: Discussion on Solana community validator updates, including version recommendations, testnet status, and validator education initiatives.
topic_summary: Updates on Solana validator version 1.13.5 recommended for mainnet [t=65:07], delinquency rates down to 1.93% [t=91:23], and testnet reactivation [t=156:48]. Call for volunteers for educational workshops [t=257:96].
